{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged sword madra
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] traces lines of [[Forged sword madra]] in the air.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
